entities.name: STRATIFIED RANDOM SAMPLING
entities.description: A sampling methodology used to assess soil fertility status by dividing the population into strata.

entities.name: SOIL FERTILITY
entities.description: The status of chemical nutrients in the soil of a region.

entities.name: SURFACE GEOLOGY
entities.description: The parent material of the soil used as a stratification criterion.

entities.name: MICROWATERSHED
entities.description: A small drainage basin used as a stratification criterion for soil sampling.

entities.name: TOPSEQUENCE POSITION
entities.description: The position of a sample on a toposequence used as a stratification criterion.

entities.name: FARM HOLDING SIZE
entities.description: The size of the farm holding tested as a factor explaining soil fertility differences.

entities.name: KARNATAKA STATE
entities.description: The state in India where the soil sampling study was conducted.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where the study was conducted.

entities.name: DESCRIPTIVE STATISTICS
entities.description: Statistical methods used to summarize the nutrient deficiency levels in sampled fields.

entities.name: PHOSPHORUS
entities.description: A soil nutrient found to be deficient in 50% of the sampled farmer fields.

entities.name: BORON
entities.description: A soil nutrient found to be deficient in 78% of the sampled farmer fields.

entities.name: ZINC
entities.description: A soil nutrient found to be deficient in 67% of the sampled farmer fields.

entities.name: SULFUR
entities.description: A soil nutrient found to be deficient in 72% of the sampled farmer fields.

entities.name: DISCRIMINANT ANALYSIS
entities.description: A statistical method used to determine which criteria best represent soil heterogeneity.

entities.name: SOIL HETEROGENEITY
entities.description: The variation in soil chemical fertility parameters across a regional scale.

entities.name: HYDROLOGICAL PROPERTIES
entities.description: Properties of water movement in soil used to represent soil heterogeneity.

entities.name: SEMI-ARID TROPICAL REGION
entities.description: The climatic and environmental condition of the study area in India.
